name: Calibre Mining Corp.
description: Calibre Mining Corp. is a Canadian-based gold mining and exploration company with a strong focus on operations in Nicaragua and the United States. The company operates several high-grade gold mines and is committed to sustainable development and responsible mining practices. Calibre's strategic approach involves leveraging its existing infrastructure to maximize production and explore new opportunities within its extensive land packages. With a robust portfolio of producing assets and exploration projects, Calibre aims to deliver significant value to its shareholders while maintaining high environmental and social standards.
